creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Once a release is created, FreeBSD does not go back to create 
newer packages for that release.  Our recommendation is that 
you update your ports tree to whatever is the latest version, 
and either attempt to load the packages from e.g. packages-9-stable, 
or, if they do not exist, attempt to build them yourself.
